title: Vanished Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials... removing the moon for a night.
body:
During the super rare Vanished Moon event, you will find that the world is shrouded in darkness, where has the moon gone? This mod does not adjust any spawn rates or add any effects, its purely cosmetic and for a rare interesting night that is much darker.

All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to the original author CorgiTaco.

Credit as well to Draconic Archer for making many other add-ons for Enhanced Celestials!
